    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]

    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
) AS [s]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
) AS [s]

2026-06-08 09:35:59.925 +03:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (20ms) [Parameters=[@__restaurantId_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [s].[Key] AS [Day], COALESCE(SUM(CAST([s].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
) AS [s]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]

    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]

        WHERE [s].[OwnerId] = @__request_owner_id_0 AND [s].[Status] = N'Active' AND [s].[EndDate] > GETDATE() AND [s0].[Name] = N'طلایی') THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END
